appInfo.name: Repertoar
appInfo.description: Your personal songbook for gigs, rehearsals, and special occasions. Store songs, create playlists, and follow your Repertoire step by step, even offline.

welcomePage.loginText: Sign in to your account (easiest with your Google account) by clicking the button below.

subscription.contactMe: Contact Webdak to continue using the app.

installFailed.header: Installation is not possible in the current browser.
installFailed.text1: To install the application on your device, open the link in the Google Chrome browser and then click the {0} button.
installFailed.text2: By clicking the button below, you can copy the application link and then paste it into the Google Chrome browser.
installFailed.text3: You can certainly continue to use the application without installing it. If you want, you can hide the "Install" button by clicking the button below.

updateDialogConfirm.message: Do you want to update the app? Before that, finish the current action because the application will close and restart itself.

message.logoutOthersSuccess: You have successfully logged out from any other devices.

userEdit.editEmailVerificationBoth: Confirmation link accepted. Both email addresses are confirmed. You will be logged out on all devices. Please log in again with your new email address.

authConfirmation.title: Email verified
authConfirmation.text: Your email has been verified successfully. You can now log in (in app if you've installed it) with your details.

resetPasswordRequest.requestMessage: A password reset link has been sent to your email. You need to click on a link that will take you to a page where you can reset your password. The link is valid for 1 hour.
resetPasswordRequest.requestFailMessage: A password reset link has already been sent to your email recently. Please try again later.
resetPasswordRequest.successfulChangeText: You will be logged out from all devices, including this one. Please log in with new password.
resetPasswordRequest.failedChangeText: New password should be different from the old password. Please try again.
resetPasswordRequest.checkingLink: The password reset link is being verified...
resetPasswordRequest.invalidOrExpiredLinkText: The password reset link has expired or is invalid. You can try again.
resetPasswordRequest.temporaryCheckFailedText: We couldn't verify the password reset link right now. Check your internet connection and try again.

aboutAppInstall.title: Installing the application
aboutAppInstall.text1: For the best possible user experience, a faster and more stable application - it is necessary to install the application through the Google Chrome browser.
aboutAppInstall.text2: To install the application on your device, open the link in the Google Chrome browser and then click the {0} button. When a window appears asking for permission to install the application, you need to confirm (Confirm / Allow / Install). If you refuse, you can repeat the process.
aboutAppInstall.text3: By clicking the button below, you can copy the application link and then paste it into the Google Chrome browser.
aboutAppInstall.text4: If you don't have Chrome browser, you can install the application or add an icon/shortcut to the home screen using other browsers (Firefox, Opera, Edge, etc.). You need to click on the three dots/dashes to open the menu and find the "Install" option or something like "Add application/shortcut to home screen".
aboutAppInstall.text5: iOS: If the above procedure does not work on your iOS device, open the app in the Safari browser, tap the Share button, and select "Add to Home Screen".
aboutAppInstall.text6: You can certainly continue to use the application without installing it.

aboutNotifications.title: Notifications
aboutNotifications.text1: Like any other application, this application can send notifications to your device, but you must first approve this by clicking on the notification icon
aboutNotifications.text2: then a window will appear asking for permission, you need to approve by clicking "Allow" or "Approve" or similar.
aboutNotifications.text3: If notifications are rejected, you can reset the site settings in your browser: Settings > Privacy/Security > Site Settings > {0} > Reset permissions.

aboutOffline.title: Offline mode
aboutOffline.text1: The application can work even when you don't have internet access, everything you do will be saved on your device and when you reconnect to the internet, the application will automatically sync with the cloud.
aboutOffline.text2: When you enter offline mode, an indicator will appear
aboutOffline.text3: which will signal this to you.
